description:
GIVEN a user that is entitled for video playback is logged in
AND the tester has opened the below DataDog link (be sure to update the search filter for the logged in test user)

**NOTE:** 
Test via the Core App URL in Chrome
Playback Heuristics URL: [https://us5.datadoghq.com/logs?query=%22PLAYBACK%20HEURISTICS%22%20%40usr.id%3A00uhs4yw8qjJKy4xb357&agg_m=%40event.metadata.currentBitrate&agg_m_source=base&agg_q=%40asset.isLive&agg_q_source=base&agg_t=avg&analyticsOptions=%5B%22line%22%2C%22dog_classic%22%2Cnull%2Cnull%5D&cols=host%2Cservice%2C%40usr.id%2C%40event.action%2C%40event.reason%2C%40event.metadata.convivaTimestamp&context_event=AY_CgMDtAAD8tvFqYXPtGgAB&fromUser=true&messageDisplay=inline&refresh_mode=sliding&storage=hot&stream_sort=%40convivaTimestamp%2Casc&top_n=10&top_o=top&view=spans&viz=&x_missing=true&from_ts=1726669870274&to_ts=1726684270274&live=true|https://us5.datadoghq.com/logs?query=%22PLAYBACK%20HEURISTICS%22%20%40usr.id%3A00uhs4yw8qjJKy4xb357&agg_m=%40event.metadata.currentBitrate&agg_m_source=base&agg_q=%40asset.isLive&agg_q_source=base&agg_t=avg&analyticsOptions=%5B%22line%22%2C%22dog_classic%22%2Cnull%2Cnull%5D&cols=host%2Cservice%2C%40usr.id%2C%40event.action%2C%40event.reason%2C%40event.metadata.convivaTimestamp&context_event=AY_CgMDtAAD8tvFqYXPtGgAB&fromUser=true&messageDisplay=inline&refresh_mode=sliding&storage=hot&stream_sort=%40convivaTimestamp%2Casc&top_n=10&top_o=top&view=spans&viz=&x_missing=true&from_ts=1726669870274&to_ts=1726684270274&live=true]

steps.action:
WHEN the user has initiated {{content}} playback
AND the tester throttles the network speed via chrome dev tools
AND the tester un-throttles the network speed after playback stops and the spinning baseball displays
steps.data:
{{content}} =

* Live / Archive game (network calls: [tv-fst.mlb.com|http://tv-fst.mlb.com] or [tv-gmc.mlb.com|http://tv-gmc.mlb.com])
* MLBN / SLIVE (network calls: [tve-live.mlb.com|http://tve-live.mlb.com])
* SVOD / VOD (network calls: [mlb-cuts-diamond.mlb.com|http://mlb-cuts-diamond.mlb.com])
* RSN 24/7 (network calls: [tve-live.mlb.com|http://tve-live.mlb.com])
* RSN VOD (network calls: [mlb-cuts-diamond.mlb.com|http://mlb-cuts-diamond.mlb.com])
